All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

I

id - Variable in class simulator.model.Process
Unique identifier of the process (PID).
InputParser - Class in simulator.io
Class responsible for reading and decoding the input file.
InputParser() - Constructor for class simulator.io.InputParser
 
InputParserTest - Class in simulator.io
Unit tests for InputParser ensuring robust parsing of irregular input files, handling of missing files, and correct extraction of configuration and process data.
InputParserTest() - Constructor for class simulator.io.InputParserTest
 
isCurrentlyDoingIo() - Method in class simulator.model.UserProcess
Checks if the current stage of the process is a system call.
isIdle() - Method in class simulator.model.Processor
Checks if the processor is idle (not running any process).
isProcessInRam(Process) - Method in class simulator.core.MemoryManager
Checks whether a process is already fully loaded into RAM.
isSwapping() - Method in class simulator.core.MemoryManager
Checks whether a Disk -> RAM transfer is currently in progress.
isTimeSliceExpired() - Method in class simulator.model.Processor
Checks if the time allocated to the current process has expired.
